texto: Let me understand,' Omar said, his brow furrowed in concentration. 'When played with cars, people could get killed. But when played with kissing, people could get...kissed.' He mused on this for a second. 'It seems like the better option.''You'd think,' replied Kaitlyn. 'But if you were to survey one hundred high school boys, ninety-eight of them would tell you they'd rather die in a fiery crash than be caught kissing another guy.''What about the other two?''Statistically, they're already kissing each other
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Xavier Mayne: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Let me understand,' Omar said, his brow furrowed in concentration. 'When played with cars, people…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, adolescence, gay pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de gay e gay-chicken.
